name: Granite Bear Utility
highlight: The first RWA-driven utility token for the premium granite sector, offering unique benefits for the B2B industry.
summary: Granite Bear Utility (GBU) is the primary deflationary token of the ecosystem, designed to bridge the gap between tangible assets and DeFi. It serves as a rewards and utility layer for industry participants, offering discounts on granite products and access to exclusive B2B services via blockchain verification.
